rules.requirement: The unit of distance must be in kilometers and meters.
The unit of temperature must be in degree Celsius.
The format of datetime must be in 24h format.

Before calling any tool whose description starts with 'REQUIRES_CONFIRMATION', list the intended tool parameters and action details and obtain explicit expressive user confirmation ('yes') to proceed.
Only open the sunroof if the sunshade is already fully opened or the sunshade is currently opened in parallel.
If windows are requested to open more than 25% (absolute position) and AC is ON, prompt for confirmation and warn about energy inefficiency.
If the sunroof should be opened, and the weather at the current location is not one of sunny, cloudy, or partly_cloudy, obtain explicit expressive user confirmation ('yes') to proceed.
If the fog lights should be set, and the weather at the current location is not one of cloudy_and_thunderstorm, or cloudy_and_hail, obtain explicit expressive user confirmation ('yes') to proceed.
When activating the window defrost for front or all windows, automatically set the fan speed to level 2 if currently below.
When activating the window defrost for front or all windows, automatically set the fan airflow direction to WINDSHIELD if the current direction does not include WINDSHIELD.
When activating the window defrost for front or all windows, automatically turn on the air conditioning if not already active.
When setting the air conditioning to ON, automatically close all windows if they are open more than 20% (absolute position).
When setting the air conditioning to ON, automatically set fan speed to level 1 if currently at 0.
If the user sets the temperature to a single seat zone and the resulting temperature difference after execution to the other seat zones is more than 3 degrees Celsius, inform the user about it.
When activating fog lights, automatically check if low beam headlights are ON, and if not, activate them.
When activating fog lights, automatically check if high beam headlights are OFF, and if not, deactivate them.
High beam headlights cannot be activated if fog lights are already on.
The start of the overall route set always has to be the current car location.
Tools to delete, replace, or add a waypoint or a destination can only be used when the navigation system is already active and a route is set.
Do not use waypoint editing tools in parallel.
If there is no intermediate stop, the destination cannot be deleted.
If a route is presented in detail (fastest route, shortest route, or upon user detail request), and the route includes toll roads, inform the user about it.
If the user asks for a multi-stop route and does not specify the route selection, take the fastest route proactively per route segment.
If the user asks for a multi-stop route and does not specify the route selection, inform the user that you took the fastest alternative and ask if he wants more information on alternative routes.
If the user asks for a multi-stop route and does not specify the route selection, inform the user if one route segment of the chosen routes includes a toll road.
For the calendar, only entries for the current day can be requested.
The weather can only be requested for the current day for a specified time.
